prompt: I want to measure how many users download our mobile app.
note: before creating: list events (does one already track this?) and list metrics (does the metric already exist?), then create. expect_state confirms the event + metric landed. Uses a 'download' domain that no other case touches so it always reads as new (the checkout domain overlaps the experiments case's checkout_conversion metric, which made this dedup instead of create).
read-only ask must not create a metric

prompt: Start tracking a signup event called dedupe_signup.
note: DEDUP: dedupe_signup event is pre-created; the ask would register it again. OUTCOME-gated — exactly one dedupe_signup event must survive. Listing first is the ideal path (informational).
